title: Skills
subtitle: Technologies and tools I've used across 7+ years of professional development.

advanced.name: Advanced
advanced.description: Can jump right in without difficulties nor causing tech debt.

solid.name: Solid
solid.description: Guaranteed autonomy, but some catch up first would be appreciated.

basic.name: Basic
basic.description: Will make it work, but most likely cause some tech debt in the process.

rusty.name: Rusty
rusty.description: Has passed more than a year since last use.

blurry.name: Blurry
blurry.description: Hard to tell when it was used for the last time.

filter.mostRelevantTooltip:
A reduced number of skills is presented to prevent old usages from adding noise to your read. If all skills are desired to be viewed select this checkbox.
More information about each skill can be read clicking on them.
